case_title: JENNY CHEN et al VS. CLODULTO GIOVELI BARRIOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TERRANCE CHOY--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY EDGAR BARRIOS (HIS SON)--SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHEN, JENNY CHEN, CELINA CHEN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, CLODULTO GIOVELI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, JENNY CHEN, CELINA CHEN, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARRIOS, CLODULTO GIOVELI JIMMY CHEN (FATHER) IS APPOINTED TO REPRESENT DIANA CHEN (MINOR-16 YEARS OF AGE)AS GUARDIAN LITEM IN THE PROCEEDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JENNY CHEN, CELINA CHEN, DIANA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, CLODULTO GIOVELI
